mission.title: harbor: Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0
mission.description: Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your harbor setup:
Check your harbor dependency version in your project manifest.
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review harbor configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant harbor configuration:
Project with Proxy Cache type not working with `v2.15.0` with message below
```
Error response from daemon: unknown: artifact mirror/portainer/portainer-ce:lts not found
```

try to  docker pull any image from the proxy cache project and message

steps.title: Apply the fix for Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0
steps.description:
set user agent to avoid some registry (e.g. docker hub) return 403 when user agent is not set to harbor-registry-client

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Issue being fixed
Fixes #(issue)

```yaml

```

steps.title: Confirm Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test harbor to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
set user agent to avoid some registry (e.g. docker hub) return 403 when user agent is not set to harbor-registry-client

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Comprehensive Summary of your change

# Issue being fixed
Fixes #(issue)

Please indicate you've done the following:
codeSnippets: Error response from daemon: unknown: artifact mirror/portainer/portainer-ce:lts not found

cd /path/to/harbor
 
# set build variables
export BASEIMAGETAG=dev
export BASEIMAGENAMESPACE=goharbor
 
# 1. compile go-binaries
make compile -e DEVFLAG=false
 
# 2. prepare versions
make prepare -e DEVFLAG=false
 
# 3. build docker images
make build -e DEVFLAG=false

prerequisites.description: A working harbor installation or development environment.
